Visiual Communication Design

MENU

Visual Communication Design offers an education in the practice and critical analysis of visual arts and design. The program aims to promote a multidisciplinary approach to the field with a selection of studio courses on a number of practice based disciplines, such as typography, photography, painting, basic design, video art and graphic design, while also providing an equal emphasis on the theoretical aspects of the field. Our department aims to encourage creativity, training designers and artists who will become critical voices and innovators in the visual arts industry.
